title: A NASA Engineer Built a $1 Billion Toy — By Accident #Shorts
desc:
In 1985, NASA engineer Lonnie Johnson was tinkering on a new kind of refrigerator at home when his experiment blasted a jet of water across his bathroom — and he realized it would make an incredible water gun. Built from PVC pipe and a soda bottle, the Super Soaker went on to sell over a billion dollars. When Johnson found his royalties had been underpaid, a 2013 arbitrator awarded him nearly $73 million.

#BrokeToBuilt #history #invention #SuperSoaker #shorts
